title: eusteralis sampsonii
intro: Eusteralis sampsonii, also known as Eustachys sampsonii, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a type of grass that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant has been found to contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Eusteralis sampsonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
